slides.title: The blood marker most people *never check*
slides.sub: Uric acid is famous for gout. But quietly elevated levels can flag deeper trouble years earlier.

slides.title: More than a gout test
slides.body: Uric acid is a waste product your body clears every day. When it runs high, it *is linked to* far more than sore joints.

slides.title: A pressure signal
slides.body: Elevated uric acid *is associated with* higher blood pressure. It can climb before the numbers on your cuff do.

slides.title: A window on the liver
slides.body: High levels often travel with *fatty liver*, the quiet buildup tied to how the body handles sugar and fat.

slides.title: Part of a bigger picture
slides.body: Together these point to metabolic syndrome, a cluster that *can raise* long-term heart and metabolic risk.

slides.title: An early, cheap read
slides.body: It sits on most standard panels already. Tracking it over time *may surface* cardiometabolic strain while it is still reversible.

slides.title: Turn your labs into *daily action*.
slides.body: Vibe Health connects your numbers to the sleep, food, movement and steps behind them, scored as one daily Health Score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
One overlooked line on your blood panel can hint at strain long before symptoms show up. 🩸🌿

Uric acid is best known for gout, but high levels are linked to blood pressure, fatty liver and metabolic syndrome. Worth watching over time. Save this. 🔖
